programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.desc: Hachi lives in a neighborhood crossed by high-speed rail tracks. Each time an express train rumbles through, Hachi's wooden house shakes, and he complains of sleep deprivation and migraines. Hachi's wife suddenly complains of abdominal pains.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack begins operating on a young boy with a serious condition when the hospital is taken over by armed men. They hold the patients and staff of the hospital hostage, and phone the police for ransom.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko is frustrated with the poor condition of their house and complains to Black Jack that she wants to move. However, Black Jack tells her he has no intention to move or renovate. He explains the reason.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack is kidnapped as he is arriving home and wakes up on a boat in the ocean. He is forced to operate on a gang member who had been severely injured during an armored car heist. Black Jack warns that the wounded man needs a blood transfusion.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Sharaku, his sister, Black Jack, and Pinoko are on an overseas trip visiting an archaeological dig headed by Sharaku's father. That night, a glowing staff that was recovered from the dig site guides a seemingly possessed Sharaku deep into the jungle.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: When Black Jack finds out that the mother wants her son to get better to send him off to war, he gets angry. She explains that her husband was executed for speaking out against the war.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryou saves people and acquires the daughter of the Hanafubuki boss as a disciple.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: The troublemaker from the Hanafubiki got expelled and now plots revenge against Ryou and the daughter.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryou takes care of a very wealthy, generous and amnesiac foreigner. Saeko lost a princess...

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: An insurance investigator partners with Ryou to find the Smile of Cleopatra before the policy kicks in.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua resume Nen training.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon faces Gido and Reihlvelt in a match.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The curtain rises on the battle between Gon and Hisoka.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon lands a solid punch on Hisoka and returns the tag.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After mastering Nen and becoming a real Hunter, Gon returns to Whale Island with Killua.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon decides to listen to the tape finds inside the box.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kurapika is determined to retrieve the eyes of his brethren and send the Phantom Troupe to the deepest depths of hell.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kurapika and the other job applicants are attacked in the mansion of a flesh collector.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon's affections start to wane as they hit the road for day three, crossing the border from Glenluce to Carlisle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The competition between Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon intensifies as they journey from Sedburgh to Leeds.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon head from Skipton to Liverpool for their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day one for expert Thomas Plant and Road Trip newbie, Scottish auctioneer Paul Laidlaw, as they travel from Skipton to Sheffield.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two for dynamic duo Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw sees them attempt to outwit each other on their way from Bolsover to the auction in Stamford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's charm versus mathematical prowess, as experts Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw hit the shops between Huntingdon and Towcester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw's negotiating tactics are tested to the limit as they travel from Olney to the auction in Watlington.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Paul Laidlaw spend their final day of antique adventuring heading from Tetsworth to the final auction showdown in Pewsey.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a new chapter as we hit the road with seasoned auctioneers James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt as they travel from Altrincham to Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt search for bargains while traveling from Leek in Staffordshire to Birmingham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt are determined to up their game as they head from Stratford upon Avon to the auction in Frome, Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day four of James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt's road trip as they scour local antique shops between Wells and the auction in Crewkerne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Jonathan Pratt's fifth leg takes them from Crewkerne in Somerset to Lostwithiel in Cornwall for their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a brand-new week, hitting the road with David Barby and David Harper as they travel all the way from Moy to Omagh in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the National Trust's beautiful Nymans garden near Crawley, where they are kept busy as they comb through over 4,000 visitors' family heirlooms in search of treasure.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the University of London's art deco jewel of Senate House in Bloomsbury. The first guest is a man who wants to know whether his airfare has been worthwhile as he presents a carved whalebone scrimshaw.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: As part of its 40th anniversary series, Antiques Roadshow arrives on the set of EastEnders for a special episode celebrating the history of film, music, theatre and television.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Black Country Living Museum, one of the finds is a Faberge treasure given one of the highest valuations ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Castle Howard in North Yorkshire, the range of objects brought for the experts to peruse is eclectic, from a terracotta figurine to a jade Buddha.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Floors Castle in southeast Scotland. Items brought for valuation include a highly collectible watch and a rare book signed by JRR Tolkien.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk. Items include a medieval sword dredged up from a pond and an Indian jewel dating back to a 1799 battle.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a return visit to the Black Country Living Museum in the West Midlands on one of the hottest days of the year.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a return visit to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, a Tudor manor house with working drawbridges and stunning gardens.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Newcastle's iconic Civic Centre unearthing treasures including a rare Lowry sketch and design plans for the RMS Mauretania.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Osborne, Queen Victoria's seaside home on the Isle of Wight. Finds include a locket with a secret and a Faberge treasure.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Only seven percent of the Great Barrier Reef is coral and the remainder is a variety of interconnected habitats including the world's oldest jungle, hundreds of islands, mangrove swamps, deep water gardens, sand flats and sea grass.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc: Creatures travel thousands of miles to visit the reef and Pacific weather patterns are likely to further shape the terrain and wildlife.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Spinner dolphins hunt shoals of lanternfish while dodging giant rays.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Revealing the family life of the orca and dolphins that wear sponges on their noses.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: A look at the archeological history of these volcanic islands and how numerous unusual species originated there.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: Something strange in the water in the Caribbean; a four-foot worm in a fish tank; a tick turns America vegetarian.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A crab is milked for its blue blood; stones move by themselves; thousands of rabbits chase down tourists.

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: A virgin snake gives birth in the U.K.; a sea serpent washes up in the U.S.; goats stand still in a tree in Morocco.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Animals appear to have stretched their natural gifts to the limits, including giraffes and chameleons.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Curiosities lead to accusations of forgery.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough looks at some amazing quirks of evolution; he encounters two examples where nature has tinkered with the aging process.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the tusk of the narwhal and the spiral shells found on snails and ammonites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Beautifully patterned or brightly colored animals attract the attention of collectors.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Female Komodo dragons can reproduce without contact with a male; female aphids can clone themselves to produce copies.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Rhinos and hedgehogs protect themselves with body armor in the form of thick skin.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: A group of seven women are put in a house together.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Jazmyn and Jaimee find allies in their new roommates and are ready as ever to flex their muscles; Angela's fate in the house is decided, after getting into it with a new housemate; Allison and Melissa contemplate their own departure.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club
programme.desc: A group of seven women are put in a house together.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Time in the house is winding down, but it doesn't seem that anyone will be ready to make amends soon; Jazmyn and Jaimee have to learn to stand on their own two feet after losing their only allies in the house.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Tanisha vows to get to the bottom of all of the drama and lies from this season as the five final housemates take to the reunion stage; tensions remain high between Jazmyn and Jaimee and the OG's.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Time has not healed broken hearts for ex-lovers, Diamond and Olivia; Life Coach Laura meets with the cast for the last time and implores them not to hurt one another.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: The Wallace sisters are in the cast's crosshairs; Hanan and Suha arrive with a vendetta; the girls recall their favorite part of being a bad girl.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Meeting the social media famous ladies before they officially move into the Bad Girls Club house.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: The girls arrive in Los Angeles and are ready to take the city by storm; first impressions can be deceiving when two bad girls are targeted for immediate eviction.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Kailie continues to be in Tabatha and Kaila's crosshairs, but when their actions are taken to the next level, someone has to pay the price; The Gang Gang Gang girls target Zee, but she is not going down without a fight.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Elliadria and Kaila's friendship begins to unravel, and the first replacement arrives; Kailie and Zee try in vain to repair their damaged relationships with the other house mates.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: Half of the Gang Gang Gang wants to hatch a plan to get rid of Zee, but things get heated when Elliadria and Kaila can't see eye to eye; Brynesha gets a chance to work with an influential LA producer.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: New besties Stephanie, Zee and Kailie enjoy their time together in the house, but that doesn't mean that their beef has been squashed with the other clique; Adryan gets a chance to work on her career.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: After the Bad Girls' survival skills are put to the test, newbie Kandyce clashes with an OG; Zee tries to smooth things over with her housemates, but realizes that she doesn't need anyone's approval to be at peace with herself.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: The Bad Girls put their drama aside when their best friends come to visit; while Zee sets her sights on personal growth, Kaila and Kandyce go head to head, resulting in another empty bed in the house.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: After a lengthy game of cat and mouse, Brynesha finally gives in to Kandyce's advances; two new Bad Girls enter the house, and an OG makes an unexpected departure.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Social Disruption
programme.desc: When Brynesha does not reciprocate Kandyce's deepening affections, the two girls face off; Kabrina gets real with her roommates; the whole house lets loose for a sexy slumber party.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of The Kasbah in Aurora, CO, find a less rowdy clientele if he's going to save the once-thriving urban hot spot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A hostile chef and a lascivious owner complicate Jon's efforts to save Dimples, America's oldest karaoke bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Owners Scott and Donna face foreclosure if Jon is unable to rescue Kid Chilleen's Badass BBQ by evicting the bar's equine and biker visitors.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must correct the behavior of a drunk and verbally abusive owner if he's going to save the historic Gipsy, Las Vegas's first gay nightclub.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must restore trust between owners and curb rampant theft among employees to save Barlow's, a failing Georgia sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Sisters Betsy and Stephanie spend most of their time at work tossing back shots, and it's up to Jon to keep these two from running their biker bar into a ditch.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owners of Marley's on the Beach may lose their business and their marriage if Jon can't reverse the financial strain put on them by the failings of their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to help two brothers whose ill-conceived idea for a death-metal concert bar has drained their parents' retirement fund.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Drug lord Mason Sato is released from prison and determined to seek revenge Mitch Buchannon, who helped send him away. When Sato kidnaps Hobie and Kaye, Mitch and Sato end up in a samurai-style fight to the death.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Reports of a coming storm and enormous waves bring painful memories for Mitch. Meanwhile, Kaye tries to persuade the parents of a deaf girl to send her to sign-language school.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Thackerville as John Salter and Chidi Njokuani face off in a pivotal middleweight showdown.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator crosses the Atlantic to bring viewers an action-packed card from Genoa, Italy! The main event sees hometown hero and Italian superstar Alessio Sakara take on Kent Kauppinen in a matchup of light heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Hawaii with the long awaited rematch between Brent Primus and (Iron) Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title. Also on the card is a showdown between heavyweight legend Frank Mir and knockout artist Javy (Eye Candy) Ayala.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Live from Hawaii, women’s Flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane puts her title on the line against Valérie Létourneau . In the co-main event, Lyoto Machida makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight king Rafael Carvalho.

programme.title: Bellator 214: Fedor vs Bader
programme.desc: A new Heavyweight champion will be crowned in the Bellator MMA cage when the last emperor Fedor Emelianenko takes on Ryan Bader in the finals of Bellator Heavyweight Grand Prix. Plus, pro wrestling superstar Jake Hager makes his long-awaited MMA debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez's fiancée, Shayanna Jenkins-Hernandez, speaks on the football star's prison suicide. She reveals their last phone call, what she thinks about his suicide note, & sheds light on the former New England Patriots' mindset. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julianne says Leighton "lied his way through life" & turned daughter, Mariah, into a liar & con artist. In a tense in-studio showdown, Julianne and couple face-off. Hotel security was called before the show, & what happened after arriving to the studio?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One of the most asked about guests on Dr. Phil returns--Brandon! Plus, a desperate family turns to Dr. Phil to save their daughter who is addicted to OxyContin and heroin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pageant mom Lori & daugther Alaska, 9, made news bleaching the girl's teeth & dyeing her eyelashes. Alaska's pic posted on TheDirty.com, with a man's claim he performed a sexual act while looking at the photo. Plus, Brittany, 21, had sex with a 14-yr-old.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ted Williams was living on the streets in Columbus, Ohio, his life ruined by substance abuse. Ted became an overnight celebrity after The Columbus Dispatch posted a web video.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Traición
programme.desc: Danny se une a la búsqueda de dos fugitivos, siendo uno de ellos alguien a quien ayudó a encarcelar injustamente. Gormley critica un plan de Trey Delgado, un sargento de la policía de Nueva York que, según el, está teniendo una aventura con su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo trata de encontrar una vínculo común entre cuatro hombres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.desc: In the season finale, eight of the greatest female bracket champions to have ever competed on the ranch return for another shot at glory. Two competitors will take on the Skullbuster, with the fastest time winning $25,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve kicks off season five with eight bad ass men looking to be the one to take on the new Skullbuster obstacle course for a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin is bringing out eight of the fiercest women to ever step foot on the ranch to battle through The Drain, Death Grip and The Octagon. The last woman standing will earn the right to take on Steve's new Skullbuster and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Things are heating up on the ranch as Steve Austin brings out eight more elite athletes to go head to head in Rip Off 2.0, Hoisted and Tire Change.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight tough-as-nails women to the ranch to take on Rip Off 2.0, Hoisted and Tire Change. At the end of the day, only one will be left standing.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new badasses descend on Steve Austin's ranch to battle it out in Trench Warfare, Stress Test and Boulder Press.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight elite female athletes have accepted Steve Austin's invitation to take on Trench Warfare 2.0, Stress Test and Boulder Press.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin has rounded up eight of the best military athletes in the country to battle it out on the ranch in Drag Race, The Wake, and Pile Drive.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin continues to bring the best athletes in the world to his ranch as eight elite women lay it on the line in Drag Race, The Wake and Pile Drive.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The big boys take their turn on Steve Austin's ranch to battle it out in Summit, Death Grip and The Peak. It will all come down to the pit, with only one man left standing to take his shot at the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight intense female athletes come to the ranch to compete in Summit, Death Grip and The Peak. They will do whatever it takes to earn the right to take on Steve Austin's Skullbuster and win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back former bracket champions and competitors they took out along the way who are back for revenge. But it won't be easy as they have to fight through Trench Warfare and Chain Gang.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin welcomes back eight of the toughest runners up to ever compete on the ranch for a second shot at glory. They'll battle it out in The Drain and The Octagon before two of them get a chance at the Skullbuster and $25,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back sixteen of his favorite competitors for a special Co-Ed Broken Skull Challenge, where they will take on brand new challenges The Monster and Block Party.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: Jesús, nuestro Señor

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Capulina corazón de león
programme.desc: Capulina accidentalmente adopta un león de una tienda de mascotas, pensando que es un gato. Las cosas se complican cuando, encima de todo, lo toman por asaltante.

programme.title: El circo de Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina viaja a Monterrey para trabajar en un circo y ayudar a su sobrina a recuperar un terreno que ha heredado, el cual esconde un tesoro enterrado por un coronel revolucionario.

programme.title: Capulina vs las momias
programme.desc: Un taxista lleva hasta Guanajuato al sobrino de un científico que busca en las momias el secreto de la vida.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila, sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: Sin salida
programme.desc: Mitch es un abogado atraído por una gran firma con la promesa de un futuro brillante. Las cosas no salen según lo planeado después de que se ve envuelto en un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: A.I. Inteligencia artificial
programme.desc: En un mundo futuro, los humanos comparten aspectos de su vida con robots de compañía llamados "Mechas". Pero cuando un prototipo de niño-robot llamado David es programado para demostrar amor incondicional..

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Sirenas
programme.desc: Una joven se ve atrapada en una guerra emocional, al lidiar con su primer amor y una madre poco convencional.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: ¿Quién llamó a la cigüeña?
programme.desc: La vida de J.C. (Diane Keaton), una mujer de clase alta obsesionada con el trabajo, da un vuelco cuando 'hereda' una bebé.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: La ciudad del pecado (Sin City)
programme.desc: En estas historias entrecruzadas, un universo de héroes improbables y reacios, intentan hacer lo correcto en una ciudad a la que ya no le importa nada.

programme.title: Escape de Los Ángeles
programme.desc: El hombre del parche regresó. Llámenlo Serpiente. Su tarea es recorrer Los Ángeles destruido para recuperar un dispositivo letal.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: Ambientado en Los Ángeles, en un futuro distópico cercano desgarrado por disturbios, 'Hotel Artemis' sigue a La Enfermera, que dirige una secreta sala de emergencias sólo para miembros, para delincuentes.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Guerrero americano
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff es Joe Armstrong, una máquina de pelear que sirve en el Ejército para evitar cumplir condena. Él sera obligado a enfrentarse con la mortífera Orden de la Estrella Negra y con los líderes militares para acabar con la venta ilegal de armas.

programme.title: Lluvia de fuego
programme.desc: Cuando una explosión sacude a Boston, el experto en escuadrones de bombas Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) se ve inmerso en el trabajo más desgarrador de su carrera.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: With camp security raised, Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies. The solution? Make liberal use of Carter's remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of a new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new Human Humane committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Henry Jefferson seems to be moving away to open up his own cleaning store and Louise and Lionel are planning a going away party. Archie refuses to set foot in the Jefferson's home and George Jefferson refuses to have white people in his home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A heat wave hits New York, putting all of the Bunkers in bad moods and, to put salt on an already open wound, the air conditioner breaks down.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The new neighbors, Irene and Frank Lorenzo, settle into the house next door. Soon Archie is annoyed with both of them, as Irene makes friends with Edith and Archie soon grows jealous of all the time that Edith is spending with her.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While shopping at the supermarket, Edith befriends a lonely old man, Mr. Quigley, who ran away from the nursing home.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's priceless crystal bowl gets broken -- and there are three conflicting stories describing the accident.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Magic Knight Rayearth
programme.desc: Umi and Fuu continue fighting the monsters in the castle's residential quarters; Hikaru chases after Nova, who threatens to kill Lantis.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: Capt. Gloval and Lisa fly to Alaska, where they find the United Earth Defense Government unexpectedly reluctant to avoid war with the Zentraedi; Rick and Minmei visit her parents in Japan and learn about a massive cover-up concerning the SDF-1.

programme.title: Robotech
programme.desc: The citizens of Macross City revolt after the Earth government prohibits them from leaving the SDF-1; Lynn Kyle, Minmei's cousin, stirs up trouble on the ship and causes Lisa grief over her dead fiancé; Rick suffers injury during a Zentraedi attack.

programme.title: Tokyo Majin
programme.desc: Yagyu delivers death to many in a brutal battle.

programme.title: Tokyo Majin
programme.desc: The citizens of Tokyo come together to rebuild and heal; the gang ponders the fate of Tatsuma.

programme.title: Tokyo Majin
programme.desc: Friendships and struggles are revealed by a glimpse into the past.

programme.title: Tokyo Majin
programme.desc: Those who fight to keep Tokyo safe from evil get a chance to live as normal high-school kids.

programme.title: Kaleido Star
programme.desc: Sora dreams of becoming a star, but a scumbag steals her luggage and makes her miss the only audition of the year.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es encontrada muerta en su departamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The dry forest, which once covered the entire Pacific coast of Central America, now exists only as isolated "vestiges". In Costa Rica, however, it has been revived and even expanded thanks to the efforts of biologists and the local population.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect it's population.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: The richness of Portugal's coastal waters is amazing. Thousands of creatures live here, both in the water and on land. The Portuguese coast is the ultimate frontier before the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Tucked away in China's southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: The incorrect floor nails are sent from SA, Ant goes to town to get some, but finds out the small bag comes at quite a price!

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia
programme.desc: Central Indonesia is a wild, volcanic world. Trapped in the heart of the monsoon, rains have created a paradise and driven the evolution of rich and bountiful life.

programme.desc: Angela and the feds pressure Tommy to flip on Lobos or spend his life in jail; Ghost faces consequences for trying to do the right thing.

programme.desc: Ghost deals with threats from Kanan and Angela's investigation as bodies continue to drop within his organization.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: James prepares to leave Ghost behind; Angela must choose between honor and love; Shawn's death leaves Tasha reeling; Tommy is forced to make bold moves.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost ties up loose ends while dealing with new competition; Tommy confronts Tasha, who must learn to coexist with Angela; Tommy gains an adviser.

programme.title: Power

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Hayde logra detener un fuerte altercado y fija posición frente a Alicia. Dimas se esfuerza al tratar de evitar que Perfecta se entere de la situación que atraviesa Sebastián.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta cree que solo puede confiar en Laurentino e Iluminada, su reacción escapa de control. Justino da un paso importante para ayudar a Alicia, Hayde habla con ella sobre los niños.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Le dan de alta a Perfecta del hospital y nadie puede detener su plan, Justino le asegura a Alicia que está en el camino correcto. Laurentino y su hija saben cómo aprovecharse de la tempestad.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se entera de lo que sucede en casa de los Blanco y de los trámites que hace Laurentino, decide avisarle a Hayde. Dimas informa sobre los contratiempos en la recuperación de Sebastián.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: La salud de Justino está en juego cuando la llegada de Fabio Juster causa revuelo en el pueblo al resultar muy particular, Alicia nota su presencia. Hayde enfrenta las trampas en la fábrica.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Los gemelos le dicen la verdad a Perfecta sobre Sebastián, mientras Laurentino pretende que ella le firme un documento. Fabio le revela a Justino su identidad, su reacción es explosiva.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia Guardiola, viuda de Amador Blanco, vuelve para reclamar a sus gemelos. Tras años de prisión por un delito que no cometió, se enfrenta a su suegra y se enamora de su cuñado, sin sospechar las oscuras consecuencias.

programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that the Ricardos need a bigger apartment. She discovers that an older couple in the building just had their daughter move out and they no longer need the extra space. All she needs to do is to convince Ricky to go along with the trade.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A fortune-teller supposedly able to predict his clients' deaths is for some reason seeking out Lupin's prior victims and giving them some very disturbing readings. What's the connection to Fujiko Mine, and how far will she go to see this job through?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Magical realism plus human trafficking plus Lupin and Daisuke Jigen plus a spa vacation plus Fujiko off the deep end equals... Well, you'll just have to find out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Count Almeida has a job for Lupin, and he's not about to take no for an answer. When Lupin and Zenigata both separately make their way to the Count's villa seeking answers, the trail of clues leads to a ghost town with just one inhabitant.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A recent string of particularly flashy thefts has been tied to Fujiko Mine, who seems to have taken to sending written warnings to the police just like Lupin does. But if you ask Inspector Zenigata, something smells fishy about the whole thing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
