programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Even though Shawn and Gina have been dating for over two months, Shawn has no idea that Gina is really a man. Next, Imani comes clean about her gender to both of her boyfriends!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and Justin are here today to confess their infidelity to each other…about the same woman! Next, Joan wants to know why Mistress Flame prefers her line of work!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. She got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bob wears diapers every day, even on dates. Bob points out that he does not "use" the diaper, but merely thinks it's sexy to wear it. Our camera crew spent a day with Bob to see how he functions all day wearing diapers and the occasional tutu.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Amanda found love bites on her husband's neck so she kicked him out! Then, Amy suspects her husband is cheating, little did she know who it'd be with! Next, Christina says that if her boyfriend doesn't shape up, she's leaving him for her other lover!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mable is having an affair with her friend Cooikie's man, Levy. Although Levy has been cheating on Cookie, he still loves her and even proposes marriage! Next, Shae is here to confront her friend for sleeping with her man and get him back for good!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kitten wants to tell her mother how she really makes money, and how her neglect drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: You are the father! You are not the father! No one does paternity like MAURY and today's stories will not disappoint!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 19-year-old Raven is a future bride in a few weeks, but suspects that Robert has been cheating. Then, Jeff fears his fiancée Kristen is having sex with someone else…his uncle JB!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After a night of passion with her neighbor, Lashanda claims that Avery is the father, but his girlfriend isn't having it! Plus, Nikki needs to prove that she has never cheated on Daniel or her relationship with her entire family will be on the line!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Paul confesses 3 secrets to his girlfriend Alycia.Is Brandi's husband is still having sex with Ashley after their threesome? Plus, Tim’s fidelity status could ruin his chances of marrying Laurie!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend Marie that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michele forces her boyfriend to choose between her and his mistress Morgan. Then Rose wants her husband's mistress, Denise, to back off. But there's a catch! Next Dena is here to tell her boyfriend that she's found someone to give her attention.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de tanto silencio y tantos planes que expresó con emoción Willy, Mariana decide hablar de su anterior compromiso matrimonial para así descartar la idea de que su amor es posible.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la universidad, Willy y Mariana se besan tras su reunión, dándole la oportunidad a Margot de descubrir quién es su rival. Valentín no tiene otra opción que rendirse ante el chantaje de Natalia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita esconde la ropa de Luis Mario para verlo desnudo. Rosaura llega a darle la comida a Luis Mario y está totalmente desnudo. No sabe que Rosaura está con el.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Eduarda que se va a casar pero no con Eva. Ella trata de averiguar quién es la mujer pero él no se lo dice. El doctor va a ver a doña Cruz y les dice que la dejen dormir.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Camila y Gerardo lamentan haber perdido a su pareja, que son Maximiliano y Marfil respectivamente. Previamente, Maximiliano le dice a sus amistades que Marfil no tiene problemas en darle hijos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana entra a la cárcel y Gaviota le ofrece su ayuda. Cuando Gaviota sale en libertad, Diana la echa de menos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Al ver a Maximiliano, Diana recuerda que él la vio cuando la apresaron, pero ella le miente diciéndole que tal vez se vieron en algún centro comercial.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana se abruma ante los halagos de Maximiliano. Diego los escucha y los interrumpe.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la universidad, Willy y Mariana se besan tras su reunión, dándole la oportunidad a Margot de descubrir quién es su rival. Valentín no tiene otra opción que rendirse ante el chantaje de Natalia.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Al buscar la ayuda de su madre, Mariana es víctima de una desagradable noticia, que presuntamente expresa el deseo de Leonora de no ser molestada por su antigua familia.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de firmar el contrato comprometiéndose a casarse con un desconocido millonario, Mariana expresa a su amiga Elena el temor por un futuro incierto al lado de un hombre que no ama.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy vengará su dolor con ofensas contra Mariana sabiendo que está a su lado por el interés a su dinero, luego de negarse hasta el cansancio a escuchar sus razones para casarse con él.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) agrees to testify against the Taelons in return for immunity.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) suspect Zo'or (Anita La Selva) of orchestrating a series of murders.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) is torn between love and duty when her boyfriend (Cameron Daddo) is captured by the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons' impending death stasis sparks a battle of wills between Da'an (Leni Parker) and Zo'or (Anita La Selva).

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew installs a new AI in a new Commonwealth battleship, and naturally, things don't go as they should.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr convinces the Nietzscheans that he is the reincarnation of Drago Museveni, and they leave the Commonwealth.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A message from a collector sends Dylan on a quest to rescue a hostage and find the remains of the Commonwealth fleet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Citizen Eight tries to remove Dylan from command of Andromeda.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Outsider
programme.desc: Johnny takes on a major corporation to prevent the mass marketing of a drug he foresees will cause terrible birth defects years down the line.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Precipitate

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta furioso al darse cuenta de que le arruinaron su mejor fiesta, Norma le reclama a Gabriela su complicidad con Dínora y corre a buscar a Juan, su madre acepta que se casen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula se comunica con Adela para conocer la situación en la hacienda. Esteban está dispuesto a traicionar a Paula, mientras José pierde la oportunidad de quitarle el niño a Beatriz. Julieta quiere comprar un bebé y se torna violenta en el pueblo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Nacho trata de manipular a Lucas para ponerlo en contra de Rosario, luego le pone una trampa a Consuelo y la viola. La desesperación de Julieta por un hijo hace que le pida a Pedro que embarace a una mujer para que le robe el bebé y se lo dé.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan no deja de pensar en Paula. El doctor le dice a Julieta que la quimioterapia dio resultados. Julieta se pone agresiva y le da una cachetada, ella cree que Juan la dejará si se recupera. Consuelo llega a la casa maltratada por la violación.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le exige a su madre que le diga quién es su padre. Pedro se da cuenta que Julieta finge y usa su enfermedad para manipular a todos. Esteban le cuenta a José la ubicación de Paula y Sofía. Consuelo oculta la verdad a Rosario sobre la violación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica comprueba que espera un hijo de Alejandro y lo busca para darle la noticia, pero él se muestra tan frío que ella decide marcharse. David enfrenta a Verónica para defender a su abuela, pero ella se mantiene firme. Rodrigo interroga a Guerra.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Macario y Lucas ponen una bomba en el hospital para liquidar a Lagarto. Francisca lo presiente y avisa a Alejandro, y vuelve a sufrir un desmayo. Antonia dice que Aníbal se está convirtiendo en un cobarde. Rodrigo reta a Verónica y a sus aliados.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas viola a Cecilia y la deja grave. David la encuentra y enloquece de dolor al enterarse de lo sucedido. Ricardo y Luisa hacen el amor y él comprueba que está curado de su impotencia; quiere rehacer su vida con su esposa. Francisca espera un bebé.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David golpea con furia a Lucas y lo abandona, pensando que está muerto. Macario llega después y apuñala a Lucas en venganza por el asesinato del Chopo. David se entrega, pero niega su responsabilidad cuando se entera de las puñaladas. Lucas sobrevive.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams slide six stories into a shark tank and one racer must conquer her fear of heights to make it through this leg of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team musters up the courage to reveal a personal secret to the others, and another Racer breaks down in tears as the stress of the Race mounts.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The lack of cooperation hinders one team's efforts at an explosive Detour. Also, during the series' first ever Switchback, Teams return to one of the most infamous Roadblocks in the history of the show.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The racers end up knee-deep in Estonian bogs, and two teams are neck and neck in their race to the pit stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tempers flare when one team goes back on their word and a Team spirals into last place when their taxi is stolen by another Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team decides to take a four-hour penalty when they're unable to complete a Roadblock, and another team dodges intoxicated locals while trying to complete their Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A million dollars is at the final three teams' fingertips as they count out a maddening amount of poker chips and race to see Mr. Las Vegas, who holds the final clue to the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven teams take off from Los Angeles, California on race around the world, starting with a stop in Valparaiso, Chile, where a high-wire walk Roadblock tests the mettle of several racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Engineers
programme.desc: Today’s featured creatures are some of nature’s greatest engineers and architects. Constructing fortresses from leaves, designing homes with an eye for color, and building cozy bedrooms like you’ve never seen.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi journey to the remote beaches of Santa Rosa National Park in Costa Rica to look for elusive jaguars that prey on nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Cold blooded creatures all need warmth to survive, but they can be found some in some very different habitats. Come along with Jack as he crisscrosses the globe to meet stingrays, giant tortoises, scorpions, thorny devils and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Ancient Animals
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the mammals, reptiles and birds that have hardly changed since prehistoric times.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family meet a seldom-seen monotreme – the platypus, help veterinarians at a groundbreaking hospital and walk up to wild emus. Of course, no trip to Australia is complete without seeing some kangaroos!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to visit a hospital dedicated to saving sea turtles. They return a rescued sea turtle back to the wild and meet some incredible patients at the hospital.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi trek into Rwanda's forest to see Colobus monkeys with their famous black-and-white markings, and hike a volcanic island filled with fruit bats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Baby, You're the Greatest
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is going more than a little baby crazy! Today, cute and cuddly creatures guaranteed to make you smile. A darling orangutan, wee little warthogs, a sleeping baby bear and more cuteness than you can count!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are heading to the quaint Danish town of Solvang, California! Join Jack and Julie as they get down and dirty at Lil Orphan Hammies, an amazing rescue center for pigs of all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he enrolls his grandkids in zookeeper training at Arizona's Wildlife World Zoo! From training Sea Lions and bottle-feeding baby animals to encounters with Kangaroos, Lemurs, Warthogs, Ostrich, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Check out just how wild a zoo can get. Come along with Jack as he visits some of the most innovative Zoos around the world and meets creatures like, Orangutans, Koalas, Sea Lions, Camels, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack leaves his safari truck behind and treks into the wild, on foot, to meet animals face-to-face. Come along as he encounters, Lions, Bats, Cheetahs, Hippos, Sea Turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Get a glimpse of Jack in his own backyard on this trip to Bigfork, Montana. And, Jack and Sue visit Triple D Game Ranch to get an up-close look at bears, wolves, and even an elusive cougar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Rest Stops
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is on an epic animal road trip, meeting up with amazing creatures at the wildest rest stops on the planet! Sea turtles nesting in West Africa, whale sharks feeding in Belize, birds wading in Canada and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the Amazon jungles in Ecuador and Peru. Pink Dolphins, Anaconda, Caiman, Baby Tapirs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six of nature’s spectacularly scary stories, like the toxic king cobra, the gargantuan griffon vulture, a cockroach-infested bat cave, a real-life dragon, and more wickedly wild creatures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of his favorite beaches and meets the animals that live there, like Sea Turtles, Sea Lions, and loads of other marine life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he embarks on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he comes face-to-face with alligators and rattlesnakes. And, a rare look at the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack kicks things off in western Canada where he learns the horse riding ropes from a genuine cowboy, then he heads to Florida to visit a very different kind of retirement home, all before seeing an incredible horse whisperer at work in California.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his family as they immerse themselves into the elephant population at Zimbabwe's Hwange National Park. The Hanna's hide-out underground in a unique bunker at one of Hwange's watering holes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi for their most incredible Costa Rican adventures, like spotting a wild Jaguar, encountering the land of the stray dogs, and meeting venomous vipers.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.desc: A producer of TV commercials casts Judy in a singing spot without first checking out the quality of her voice.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A shy young man becomes a completely different person at night; a businessman who doesn't have time for his family learns a valuable lesson.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A magician keeps his engagement secret in order to dazzle female audiences, while his neglected fiancee turns to Captain Stubing for comfort.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Things do not go as planned when a group of Kingdommers delivers goods to the Saviors during a routine supply drop-off.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Saviors visit the Hilltop unexpectedly, surprising everyone, with plans of taking more than supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group of Alexandrians embarks on a journey; one member of the group must make a heartbreaking decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The stakes continue to grow higher as paths cross; the group enacts an intricate plan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group, along with the Kingdom and Hilltop, have banded together to bring the fight to Negan and the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The plan involving Alexandrians, Kingdommers and Hilltoppers unfolds; as Rick continues to fight, he encounters a familiar face.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Conflict with the Saviors leads to unintended consequences for the Hilltop, the Kingdom, and Alexandria; morality proves tricky in wartime.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new weapon in the Savior arsenal proves to be a giant hurdle as fighting continues between Rick's forces and those of the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A close look at Negan and the lives of the Saviors during the conflict through a familiar set of eyes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With things looking up for Rick and the group, an argument breaks out at the Hilltop; the consequences of the decision are life versus death.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan has to enlist the help of his lieutenants in solving a huge issue facing the Sanctuary; Rick and the group continue to enact the plan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Every story and battle from the first half of the season comes crashing together in this action-packed, emotional mid-season finale.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick faces new difficulties after a battle; the fight continues in other communities as core members face hard decisions.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Groups unite their forces and converge on the Hilltop; Aaron and Enid search for allies; Simon takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds himself in bad company as his group heads to the Hilltop; Maggie makes difficult decisions at the Hilltop; Gabriel's faith becomes tested.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El gobernador presiona para obtener información. Llega un nuevo huésped a la prisión, lo que obliga a Rick a actuar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea sale al frente cuando los habitantes de Woodbury entran en territorio desconocido. En la prisión, se genera un nuevo peligro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick trata de rescatar a uno de los miembros de su grupo. Woodbury está en estado de anarquía después del ataque reciente. Los nuevos huéspedes causan inquietud en la prisión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo debate sobre el curso de acción a seguir, Rick sale a buscar a un amigo perdido. Daryl y Merle cuestionan sus elecciones. El Gobernador restablece el orden en Woodbury y hace planes para castigar a los culpables.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al peligrar su seguridad, Rick y el grupo deben tomar una decisión. Andrea está intranquila ahora que Woodbury se encuentra en estado de sitio.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que las fuerzas del Gobernador los superan ampliamente en armamento, Rick lidera una expedición para conseguir más armas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con la intención de impedir más muertes, Rick y el Gobernador se encuentran para tratar de establecer un tratado de paz.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador persigue a un disidente que se escapó de Woodbury. Mientras él se encuentra fuera de la ciudad, un traidor trata de sabotear sus próximos planes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo se enfrentan a un serio problema. Si quieren hacer una tregua con el Gobernador, tendrán que estar dispuestos a hacer un sacrificio enorme.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo tienen que considerar seriamente si vale la pena defender la prisión cuando el ataque del Gobernador es inminente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo están lo más cerca posible de una vida ideal en la prisión. ¿Serán capaces de mantener su humanidad al enfrentar un nuevo mal?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo enfrenta a un enemigo totalmente nuevo, Rick y los demás deben luchar para proteger la forma de vida que les costó tanto conseguir en la prisión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras un grupo sale de la prisión para buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los que se quedan deben lidiar con las pérdidas recientes y preservar lo que quedó.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras llevan a cabo la misión de buscar provisiones en una universidad de la zona, los integrantes del grupo se topan con múltiples obstáculos. La situación en la prisión empeora.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Alfredo Escalera
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1978 Alexis Arguello fought Alfredo Escalera for the WBC World super featherweight title that ended in the 13th round.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Jose Zepeda vs Ivan Baranchyk
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 2020 Jose Zepeda faced Ivan Baranchyk in a battle for WBC silver super light weight title at the Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with both opponents going down it ended in a victory for Zepeda.

programme.title: Josh Taylor vs Jose Ramirez
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2021, Josh Taylor fought Jose Ramirez for the undisputed super lightweight title in Las Vegas. With a lot of bad blood going into the fight, Josh Taylor prevailed, winning by a close unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: It’s The Monsters of Madness vs. Adrenaline and Fire. Both teams will test their metal. In the end, only one will claim victory as The WOW Tag Team Champions of the World! Will speed overcome power and strength? Or will size dominate the underdogs?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick 'accidentally' poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene’s teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard’s feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight’s Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self-proclaimed 'Grits N Glam' duo Jessie Jones and Amber O’Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa into a match against a deadly mystery opponent.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Two men who once robbed Bart are on the loose again -- and robbing him again. But Bart notices a look of recognition between his lovely traveling companion and one of the outlaws.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart helps a con man who owes him money, double-crossing and double-crosser, which only creates more problems for him.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart teams up with the owner of a gambling establishment to ward off the threats of a big-talking young cowboy.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bart has trouble retrieving his poker winnings from thieves he gets help from -- and is drawn to -- a beautiful young woman whose father has amassed a large gambling debt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) decides to go undercover to prevent editor Claibourne (Richard Eastham) from being murdered by a hitman who has been hired by a vengeful, local rancher whom the editor once helped to send to prison.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: As Clay watches the arrival of the stage from Tucson, a shooting down the street diverts his attention, and a $30,000 army payroll is stolen from a cavalry captain on the stage. Wounded and disarmed, he's forced into a battle to solve the crime.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Two Cheyennes have been killed, which can start a new Indian war. The Cheyenne chief plans to attack Dodge City for revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Mrs. McGill resorts to guns to save their water and pasture for Hap Dorsett who she hopes will marry her daughter.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp is involved in the backlash from Custer's last battle when crooked Indian agents come to Dodge City to blame the army and Capt. Benteen for the loss.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp arrests a drunk Sgt. Craig for killing an Indian in a Dodge City store. However, the Captain at Fort Dodge has other ideas about whether it is a crime for a soldier to kill an Indian.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Ben Thompson returns as a dealer at a saloon outside Dodge City. When he is caught cheating, he engages in a gunfight with several hands from the Circle Bar ranch.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: George Morris is willing to pay $1500 to Rule Hawes who was a Tennessee sharpshooter to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wells Fargo asks Earp to help stop holdups by Curly Bill Brocius' gang at the station called the Little Alamo.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp receives word that Fred Colby has been released from prison. Earp has no knowledge of him so he fills in the blanks with info from Hal, others and old city records.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?
